MonsterSubfolders.Name: Monster Subfolders
MonsterSubfolders.Hint: Comma-separated list of folder IDs for monster subfolders.

SummonSound.Name: Sound File Path
SummonSound.Hint: Path to the sound file played when summoning.

SummonAnimation.Name: Animation Path
SummonAnimation.Hint: Path to the animation (e.g. JB2A) used when summoning.
